headline: Agilent Receives FDA Approval for Expanded Use of PD-L1 IHC 22C3 pharmDx on Dako Omnis in Esophageal Squamous Cell Carcinoma, Triple-Negative Breast Cancer, Cervical Cancer, and Gastric or Gastroesophageal Junction Adenocarcinoma

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Agilent Technologies, Raises Price Target to $155
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Derik De Bruin   maintains Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A) with a Buy and raises the price target from $145 to $155.

headline: Laboratory Equipment Services Market by Service Type, Service Provider, Equipment Type, Contract Type - Global Forecast to 2030
summary: The global laboratory equipment services market is set to soar, reaching USD 35.4 billion by 2030, expanding from USD 18 billion in 2025, with a CAGR of 14.5%. This growth is spurred by increased R&D investments, higher healthcare spending, and technological advancements. The Asia-Pacific region leads with the highest CAGR, fueled by robust infrastructure growth in countries like China and India.
